name: Other Motor Vehicle Parts Manufacturing
rationale: Existing ZOLLERN market. Precision cold-drawn profiles supply seat rail tracks, window regulator guides, drivetrain shaft blanks, and body structural inserts to Tier 1 automotive OEMs. IATF 16949 certified with EN 10204 3.1 documentation. 0 knockout constraints; 3 mitigable (C5 min carbon, C8 tooling lead time, C9 IH length).
entryStrategy: Existing market — expand share in seat system Tier 1s (Adient, Lear, Faurecia) and body/closure Tier 1s (Magna, Gestamp, Kirchhoff) via PPAP-ready near-net-shape profiles with integrated IH.
